components.notes: The pinned repository contains an MIT LICENCE file attributed to Qiusi Zhan.

components.scope: user, attacker, and synthesized test-case files consumed by the importer
components.notes: The repository does not declare separate data terms or transitive data provenance; retrieve pinned raw files into the ignored local cache and review before redistribution.

components.scope: tools.json, attacker_simulated_responses.json, and externally hosted model outputs
components.notes: These artifacts are unnecessary for static import and are deliberately excluded.

constraints: Do not treat the repository MIT license as an explicit transitive data-license grant.
Keep imported records and generated dataset payloads local until data redistribution is reviewed.
Do not download model-output archives or execute the benchmark during dataset construction.
Preserve the pinned revision, per-file checksums, source fields, and source-derived label status.
citations: InjecAgent: Benchmarking Indirect Prompt Injections in Tool-Integrated Large Language Model Agents. arXiv:2403.02691.
